initiatives.name: Montgomery Food Share
initiatives.description: A community-led mutual aid network focused on addressing food insecurity in Montgomery through food distribution, community gardens, and resource sharing.

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid MGM
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community care through direct support in Montgomery. They coordinate resource distribution, emergency assistance, and solidarity networks while building power through community relationships, collective action, and creating spaces for neighbors helping neighbors.
